name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim after my fall at work in West Valley City?

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim after my fall at work in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.description: In Utah, report within 180 days to qualify for benefits; employers then have 7 days to report to insurer.[1] Missing this disqualifies you.[1] Key factors: Get physician's Form 123 within 7 days of visit; request copies.[1] Act fast to preserve evidence and start medical/disability payments.[2] Timely filing unlocks medical care and wage replacement.[1]
